message:
test(policy-diagnostics): add 6 telemetry snapshot property tests (15→21 total)

Extends proptest suite with PolicyEngineTelemetrySnapshot coverage:
JSON serialization, pretty-print roundtrip, timestamp correctness,
top-level subsystem key completeness (16 keys), and idempotency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
